improvements.title: Waveform Visualization
improvements.description: Add audio waveform display in the versions tab player using WaveSurfer.js. Show a visual waveform for uploaded/generated audio files with playback position indicator and click-to-seek.

improvements.title: AI Prompt Improvement Suggestions
improvements.description: Add a 'Suggest Improvements' button in the Prompt tab. When clicked, call Anthropic Claude with the current prompt, style settings, and evaluation scores/feedback to generate 3 concrete suggestions to improve the prompt. Show the suggestions inline with a one-click 'Apply' button.

improvements.title: Side-by-side Version Comparison Modal
improvements.description: Add a 'Compare' button in the Versions tab. Opens a modal that lets users select two versions and displays them side-by-side: prompts diff, style diffs, evaluation scores comparison, ratings. Highlight differences in color.

improvements.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
improvements.description: Add keyboard shortcuts for power users: J/K to navigate between tracks in sidebar, 1-6 to switch tabs, G to trigger generation, N for new version, C to clone current version. Show a keyboard shortcut help panel accessible via '?' key.

improvements.title: Prompt Templates Library
improvements.description: Add a 'Templates' button in the Prompt tab that opens a panel with pre-built prompt templates organized by genre (Electronic, Hip-Hop, Cinematic, Ambient, etc.). Each template includes a sample prompt and style config. One-click to apply to current version.

improvements.title: Track Statistics Summary Card
improvements.description: Add a stats card visible in the dashboard sidebar or header showing per-track analytics: total versions, average rating, best dimension scores, generation success rate, most used provider. Display as a compact collapsible card.

improvements.title: Export Track as JSON
improvements.description: Add an Export button in the track header (or context menu). Exports the full track data (all versions, prompts, styles, scores, feedback) as a downloadable JSON file. Also add an Import button that reads a JSON and creates a new track from it.

improvements.title: Auto-Generate Track Name with AI
improvements.description: Add a magic wand icon button next to the track name input field in the create/edit track form. When clicked, sends the current prompt and style to Claude and returns 3 creative track name suggestions. User picks one or keeps their own.

improvements.title: Generation Progress Indicator
improvements.description: Replace the current simple polling toast with a rich inline progress card in the Versions tab showing: provider name, model, elapsed time, animated progress bar, and status updates (queued → processing → uploading → done). Persist the card until dismissed.

improvements.title: Quick Tags on Tracks
improvements.description: Add a tag input field in the sidebar track list item and in the track header. Tags are free-form strings (e.g. #collab #client-x #needs-work). Tags are stored in the tracks table (add a tags jsonb column via migration). Filter by tag in the sidebar search.

improvements.title: Evaluation Radar Chart
improvements.description: In the Evaluate tab, replace or complement the 7 dimension sliders with a spider/radar chart visualization using a lightweight charting library (recharts is already available via shadcn ecosystem). Show the radar chart comparing current version vs best version overlay.

improvements.title: Confetti + Best Version Celebration
improvements.description: Add a delightful confetti animation (using canvas-confetti) when a user marks a version as the best. Also add a subtle pulse animation to the star icon in the sidebar for the track's best version. Small UX delight that makes the app memorable.
